title: Papa Don't Preach
why_this_song: Papa Don't Preach by Madonna (1986) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 16 times; first heard in: "And I don't mean maybe, please"
Appears 15 times; first heard in: "Papa I know you're going to be upset"
Appears 14 times; first heard in: "Papa don't preach"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "I'm not a baby"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "I'm in trouble deep"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "don't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "don't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "papa" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "papa" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Papa I know you're going to be upset
We can raise a little family

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Papa Don't Preach" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Papa Don't Preach" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Papa Don't Preach" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Papa Don't Preach" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Papa Don't Preach" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Papa Don't Preach"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
